Detector performance is characterized by the
relative efficiency of 90% to a 7.6 cm thick
and 7.6 cm in diameter Na-I(Tl) detector and
an energy resolution 2.1 keV full width at
half-maximum at the 1.33 MeV peak of Co-60.
.Samples were irradiated with and without cadmium
shield. Because 59Co and 197Au have different sensi-
tivities to thermal and epithermal neutrons, monitor
wires allow to determine the thermal and epithermal
aluminum  wires which were used to monitor neutron
